qa.question: What are your policies and commitments for managing GHG emissions and climate-related impacts?

answer.value: Coworks is committed to reducing GHG emissions across our shared workspaces. Our footprint is primarily Scope 2 from HVAC and lighting to keep our spaces comfortable 24/7. We target a 20% reduction in electricity consumption intensity by 2028 and monitor commuting emissions from our members (Scope 3).

qa.question: What processes do you use to track the effectiveness of your emissions management actions?

answer.value: Tracked monthly through electricity sub-meters per floor. The ESG Committee reviews energy intensity per hot desk quarterly.

qa.question: Has the organisation taken initiatives to reduce GHG emissions?
Describe the GHG reduction initiative(s) undertaken.

answer.value: Implemented smart HVAC and occupancy sensors in all meeting rooms. LED lighting upgrades across all open-plan hot desk zones.

answer.value: Not applicable, we do not purchase offsets currently.
